sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.description: Creates and updates warranty claim records in the system. Use with operationName 'create' to create new claims, 'lookup' to find existing claims, or 'update' to modify claim records with decisions and recommendations.
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.inputs: [{"name":"customer_name","value":"","description":"Name of the customer filing the claim","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"device_serial_number","value":"","description":"Serial number of the device","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"claim_reason","value":"","description":"Reason for the warranty claim","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"state","value":"","description":"State of the claim (1=New, 2=In Progress, 3=Closed)","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"priority","value":"","description":"Priority level (1=Critical, 2=High, 3=Moderate, 4=Low)","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"short_description","value":"","description":"Brief summary of the claim","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"crudInputs","value":{"operation":"create","table":{"value":"x_snc_medwc_auto_0_warranty_claim","displayValue":"x_snc_medwc_auto_0_warranty_claim"},"fieldValues":[{"field":{"id":"customer_name","sublabel":"customer_name","excludedOperators":[],"label":"customer_name","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"customer_name"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{customer_name}}"}},{"field":{"id":"device_serial_number","sublabel":"device_serial_number","excludedOperators":[],"label":"device_serial_number","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"device_serial_number"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{device_serial_number}}"}},{"field":{"id":"claim_reason","sublabel":"claim_reason","excludedOperators":[],"label":"claim_reason","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"claim_reason"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{claim_reason}}"}},{"field":{"id":"state","sublabel":"state","excludedOperators":[],"label":"state","type":"choice","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"state"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{state}}"}},{"field":{"id":"priority","sublabel":"priority","excludedOperators":[],"label":"priority","type":"integer","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"priority"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{priority}}"}},{"field":{"id":"short_description","sublabel":"short_description","excludedOperators":[],"label":"short_description","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"short_description"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{short_description}}"}}]},"description":"Create operation configuration","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null}]
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.name: Manage Warranty Claim Records
